payload.description:
Implementation task for the runtime scoring architecture diagram.

Scope:
- Inspect existing diagram palette and related architecture diagrams.
- Create a new Excalidraw file in the documentation diagrams area.
- Show Azure-hosted Tethr Kubernetes runtime placement, AWS-hosted GraphQL control plane, and the in-cluster data API for Items, Score Results, and Feedback Items.
- Keep the styling consistent with the existing documentation diagrams.
payload.title: Create Excalidraw runtime scoring architecture diagram
